activity_summary: A support operations manager reviews refund escalation cases and decides approve, policy review, or missing evidence.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static refund review UI directs the reviewer to return R-1842 for a receipt photo before approval.
parsed.html:
Refund Review Workspace

Evidence incomplete: receipt photo is missing.

Review evidence

R-1842 - Nora Diaz - $184.20

Renewal date confirmedRefund reason notedReceipt photo missing

Choose next action

Manager approval can wait until proof is attached. Return the request to the customer for the missing receipt photo.

Leave handoff

Receipt photo is missing. Ask Nora Diaz to attach proof before approval.
